note_to_bot: These are CONTEXT for you to draw on, NOT scripts to paste verbatim. Pull ONE relevant point per reply and say it in your own words, shorter. WhatsApp chat style, not email.

faqs.a: RaceSims is India's pro-grade sim racing hardware company. Our founder Thambu is an active race engineer for Arka Motorsports — India's most decorated motorsport team with 123+ championship titles since 1987. Every kit is specced like a real race team, not a retail shop.
Chennai. We ship pan-India via Bluedart and have dealer partners in Bangalore, Hyderabad, and Kochi.

faqs.q: How long have you been operating?
faqs.a: RaceSims has been building sim racing kits in India for years, with the race-engineer approach coming from our founder's motorsports background.
Thambu. Race engineer for Arka Motorsports. Built RaceSims because there was no Indian sim racing retailer with actual race-team engineering discipline.

Race-engineer specced components. Arka Motorsports has 123+ championship titles since 1987, and we've built a RaceSims sim at their Coimbatore facility where real championship drivers train. That's the level of engineering going into every kit.

Sim racing hardware — direct drive wheelbases, steering wheels, pedals, handbrakes, cockpits, seats, monitor stands, and custom PCs. Primary brands are Conspit and VNM. We also build our own rigs, stands, and seats.

Conspit and VNM as our primary push — both authorised distribution. Simagic listed for comparison only. Moza R3 and R5 when in stock. Fanatec and Playseat coming soon. We don't carry Asetek, SimGrade, or Sim-Lab currently.
Coming soon. We can't quote prices or dates yet. Happy to flag your interest and let you know when they go live.
Coming soon. We'll flag your interest and circle back when they're live.
Not currently. If you're looking at that tier, Conspit Ares Platinum 20Nm or VNM Xtream 32Nm are our direct alternatives.
Not currently. For cockpits we offer Conspit FP-Lite / FC / FC PRO or our own RaceSims GT Sim Cockpit.
Not carried. We can match the spec with Conspit or VNM — happy to suggest based on what you're after.

Depends on discipline and budget. Quick guide: Entry Conspit → Apex Bundle ₹1,27,500. Rally → Rally Bundle ₹2,31,000. Formula → Formula Bundle ₹2,20,000. GT → GT Bundle ₹2,30,000. All gear-only. Tell me your focus and I'll narrow it.

faqs.q: What's in the Conspit Apex Bundle?
faqs.a: ₹1,27,500. 8Nm Ares Apex wheelbase, CPP Apex 2-pedal, 310 Apex rim. Entry-tier Conspit direct drive. Gear only — no rig or PC.
₹2,31,000. 12Nm Ares wheelbase, H.OA hub with round wheel, CPP Lite 2-pedal hydraulic pedals, H3 hydraulic handbrake. Rally-focused. Gear only.
₹2,20,000. 20Nm Ares Platinum wheelbase, 290GP formula wheel, CPP Lite pedals. Formula / open-wheel focused. Gear only.
₹2,30,000. 20Nm Ares Platinum wheelbase, H.OA hub with one rim, CPP EVO pedals. GT focused. Gear only.
Bundle + RaceSims GT Sim Cockpit (₹38,500) + seat + monitor(s) + PC. PC is custom build-to-order so I'd escalate for a live quote on the total.
Yes, unless you're mounting to a desk or existing aluminium profile. Our RaceSims GT Sim Cockpit at ₹38,500 is the standard rig most customers pair with these bundles.
PC is custom build-to-order — component rates change daily. Let me get you a live quote. I'll flag our team.
Happy to get you a full kit + rig + seat + monitor + PC quote. PC is always live-priced, so let me escalate to our team.
Yes, all prices are inclusive of 18% GST.
Let me connect you with our team for that conversation.
100% advance via Razorpay — UPI, credit/debit card, or netbanking. We'll share the payment link once the quote is confirmed.
Yes, via Razorpay. No-cost EMI on select credit cards subject to bank offers at the time of payment.
No, we're 100% advance. Razorpay covers UPI / card / netbanking / EMI so most customers go through quickly.

faqs.q: Is there a partial payment option?
faqs.a: We're 100% advance as standard. For larger custom builds we can discuss — let me flag our team.
Bluedart pan-India. Insured in transit. Double-wall box packaging for gear, pallet-wrap for rigs.
In-stock gear ships in 24-48 hrs of payment clearing. Bluedart transit is typically 3-7 days. Custom rigs / PC builds add 10-14 working days before shipping.
VNM motion is built to order — 3-4 weeks before it ships.
Currently pan-India via Bluedart. International isn't standard — let me flag our team if you're outside India.
Yes, anywhere in India. ₹25,000 flat for installation plus actual travel (flight or train + stay). Or you can self-install — we include instructions and WhatsApp support.
Absolutely. The RaceSims GT Sim Cockpit + bundles are designed for home assembly. We'll guide you over WhatsApp if you hit anything tricky.

faqs.q: Install only in Chennai and Bangalore?
faqs.a: No — we send install support anywhere in India. ₹25,000 plus travel costs.

faqs.q: Do you set up the software too?
faqs.a: Yes, if you opt for installation. We'll configure the wheelbase software, sim profiles (iRacing, Assetto Corsa, Le Mans Ultimate, etc.), and monitor setup.
Conspit and our in-house rigs / seats — 1 year. VNM — 2 years. Everything else — 1 year. Covers manufacturing defects. Onsite if you're in Chennai, else return-to-base.
Manufacturing defects. Physical damage, water ingress, or modifications aren't covered.
WhatsApp us with order details and what's happening. We'll diagnose, get you an RMA if needed. Return shipping to us is your cost, we cover return shipping back.
Yes, we handle service in-house. Out-of-warranty repairs are quoted based on parts + labour.
Yes, paid MoTeC telemetry coaching — ₹10,000 per session. You send laps, we analyze braking, throttle, steering traces and racecraft. Written + voice feedback.

faqs.q: Can I book a coaching session?
faqs.a: Yes — ₹10,000 per MoTeC coaching session. Let me connect you with Thambu to schedule.

faqs.q: Do you offer a full driver development program?
faqs.a: We're building one. Not launched yet, but happy to flag your interest so we ping you when it's live.

faqs.q: Do real race teams use your sims?
faqs.a: Yes. We've built a RaceSims sim at Arka Motorsports' Coimbatore facility where their championship drivers train.

faqs.q: Can you build for corporate events?
faqs.a: Yes, we build enclosed commercial simulators for malls, arcades, events, brand activations. Custom quote — let me connect you with our team.
Yes. For bulk / corporate, let me flag our team for a proper quote.

faqs.q: Can you brand the sim with our logo?
faqs.a: Yes, for B2B we handle custom branding, wraps, enclosure finishes. Let's get on a call — I'll connect you with our team.

faqs.q: Why RaceSims over other Indian sim racing retailers?
faqs.a: Race-engineer founder. Thambu's day job is race engineer for Arka Motorsports — 123+ championship titles since 1987. Every component is specced like a real race team, not a retail shop. Real championship drivers train on RaceSims sims.
Solid starting point. But direct drive is a different universe — force feedback precision and instant response. Bit like comparing a bicycle to a motorcycle.

faqs.q: Is sim racing actually useful for real track driving?
faqs.a: Huge. F1 teams spend millions on simulators. Muscle memory, braking points, throttle control, racecraft — all transfers. Our founder is a race engineer specifically because of the overlap.
Direct drive gives you 1:1 feedback — no belt flex, no lag, full force transmission. Once you try it, belt feels like it's wrapped in cotton.
For entry / casual racing, yes. If you're coming from a belt wheel, 8Nm feels huge already. If you're competitive or pushing formula / GT seriously, 12Nm or 20Nm gives you more detail at the limit.

Triple gives true peripheral vision and correct geometry — best for competitive. Ultrawide is cleaner and one monitor to power. The GIGABYTE CO49DQ 49" ultrawide is a great single-screen option at ₹1,34,500.
Yes — we do Chennai demos by appointment. Our dealer partners in Bangalore, Hyderabad, Kochi can also demo locally.

faqs.q: Do you have dealers outside Chennai?
faqs.a: Yes. Bangalore — SimRacing HQ (Shreyas) and Racing Rigs (Lakshay). Hyderabad — Racingpoint Esports (Uday). Kochi — Niyusuki (Vishal). Plus Lights Out Sim Racing (Shashank). Or ship direct via Bluedart.

faqs.q: Who do I talk to in Bangalore?
faqs.a: SimRacing HQ — Shreyas. Or Racing Rigs — Lakshay. Both carry our range.

faqs.q: Who do I talk to in Hyderabad?
faqs.a: Racingpoint Esports — Uday.

faqs.q: Who do I talk to in Kochi?
faqs.a: Niyusuki — Vishal.

faqs.q: How much space do I need?
faqs.a: Single-screen rig fits in about 1.5m × 1.2m. Triple-screen needs ~2m wide. Happy to help you measure for your room.

faqs.q: Can I fit it in a bedroom?
faqs.a: Yes, most setups fit in a corner of a bedroom. Entry bundle + single screen + chair is maybe 1.5m × 1.2m footprint.
Our GT Sim Cockpit isn't a folding design — it's rigid aluminium for solid feel. We do offer leveling castor wheels (₹5,000) so you can roll it aside when not in use.
